name: Kartik Media Photography

reviews.text:
Hi all! Here is our genuine feedback... Thanks alot Kartik Media...Tushar & his team! For making beautiful memories that will now stay forever with us!My son Dnyanansh was extremely Happy to see beautiful Photos & Video of his  traditional Munj( thread ceremony )! We all are so happy to see how well Tushar n his team captured all important moments and the way they gave us album... We are really satisfied n happy! Some candid photos are too good... Also his sense of lighting... We loved early morning photoshoot... With natural sunlight... These pics turned out too good...!
We will cherish these moments forever! Thanks once again! We highly recommend Kartik media photographic team!
( & extremely sorry for late post... I know it is too late in everything... Especially this reply... Long time pending...But an honest one! )

Thanks once again...
Dr. Prachiti, Vishal & Dnyanansh Kulkarni!

I had wonderful experience with Kartik Media photography.  I appointed them to cover my Son's sacred thread (Munj/Vratbandh) ceremony.  Tushar and his team is highly skilled,  very polite,  understanding and professional.  Their photography and editing skills are truly amazing and their equipment and ideas were in line with latest trends.  He was quite patient with us through the whole experience and I can't thank enough for his support and great work. Looking forward to get picturised from him again.  Highly recommend him.

I had wonderful experience with Kartik Media photography.  I appointed them to cover my Son's sacred thread (Munj/Vratbandh) ceremony.  Tushar and his team is highly skilled,  very polite,  understanding and professional.  Their photography and editing skills are truly amazing and their equipment and ideas were in line with latest trends.  He was quite patient with us through the whole experience and I can't thank enough for his support and great work. Looking forward to get picturised from him again.  Highly recommend him.

Kartik photography did amazing job capturing  minute detail of Munj ceremony of my son.what I liked was he knew exactly which moments to capture and did it really nicely by adding special touches to cinematic video. Songs were very nicely selected and were apt for the ceremony.
He was really polite and listened to all our suggestions happily and incorporated them in the video and also in photos. I will definitely recommend Kartik photography for all your special moments or ceremonies.

We had a very delightful experience with Kartik Media and team. Every moment was captured delicately and with style. The still photographs as well as the video recording is done with patience and care. As a family we feel that the pictures make all of us look nice and natural which is really important considering these will be memories for a lifetime.

Thanks Kartik for capturing our beautiful moments in our wedding. Your suggestions were very helpful and brought out the pics which we had thought in reality. You are a talented guy having varied experience in photography. Your calming and heart warming nature would always lessen anxiety. Thanks once again and we will always look forward to work with you again :)

Had a good experience working with Tushar  Thopte and his team. Our Munja event was covered wonderfully and all photos and video are really good. Very polite and experienced in photography. Pricing is also quiet reasonable. Album was also neat and good quality. Will definitely recommend to everyone to use Kartik Media services.

Had a good experience working with Tushar  Thopte and his team. Our Munja event was covered wonderfully and all photos and video are really good. Very polite and experienced in photography. Pricing is also quiet reasonable. Album was also neat and good quality. Will definitely recommend to everyone to use Kartik Media services.

My experience was fantastic. Photos are clicked very nicely. I gave contract for my son's threading ceremony (MUNJ). And as I wanted to shift to other city in a week after ceremony he gave me photos and video within a week. Very nice and timely service. Very happy with the service 😊. …

Very prompt and good service. The photographer came to our house to take our pictures for the portrait and was able to deliver our frames within 2 days since we were in a rush. Frames were high quality and looked amazing. Will definitely recommend for any of your family or couple portraits!!.
